extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won the flat sprint into Follonica with consecutive stage victories after BAGIOLI Nicola animated the breakaway TV sprint earlier.
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL Mathieu delivered massive turn with 1km remaining but teammates absent, showing Alpecin sprint train coordination failure.
Israel Startup Nation controlled final bend with 500m left through HAUSSLER Heinrich but lacked pure sprinter to capitalize.
ACKERMANN admitted going too early into wind then recovering position, revealing lead-out timing miscommunication despite consecutive wins.
GAVIRIA Fernando holding orange jersey but finishing second again shows 4-second gaps accumulating under bonus seconds pressure pre-mountains.

rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: winning consecutive stages while admitting only one training ride post-illness reveals exceptional resilience under suboptimal preparation
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: neutral: producing devastating final kilometer turn but isolated from teammates exposes lead-out structural weakness
rider_signals.BAGIOLI Nicola: positive: winning TV sprint from breakaway demonstrates opportunistic aggression for Androni rider
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: neutral: launching early from wheel in 4-way blanket finish suggests confidence but mistimed effort
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: second consecutive runner-up finish losing bonus seconds daily will compound GC deficit before mountain selection
rider_signals.CIMOLAI Davide: neutral: Israel setup brought him into position but lacked finishing speed in blanket sprint
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: neutral: late run in 4-way finish indicates positioning error cost podium opportunity
